channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Investigation Underway After Roodepoort Schoolgirl Assaulted in Scholar Transport
item.description: The Greater Gauteng Learner Transport Organisation (GGLTO) is investigating a disturbing incident involving a schoolgirl being assaulted inside a minibus taxi in Roodepoort. A video widely circulated ...

item.title: Sindh schools to close on March 11 for Youm-i-Ali observance
item.description: The Sindh government has announced that all public and private schools under its administration will remain closed on Wednesday, March 11, 2026, in observance of Youm-i-Ali. The notification was issue...

item.title: The Life and Legacy of Atila Altaunbay, Grace Jones’ Former Husband
item.description: Atila Altaunbay, born in Turkey in 1976, spent much of his youth in Belgium. He initially worked as a pizza delivery boy before becoming a professional bodyguard. His life took a major turn when he me...

item.title: Court allows Charity Gethi to retain car in NYS asset recovery case
item.description: This article explains how a Kenyan court dismissed a move by the State to seize a luxury vehicle registered in the name of Charity Wangui Gethi, the mother of businessman Ben Gethi, who had been linke...

item.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Middle East Tensions and Market Volatility
item.description: On Monday, trading floors were under significant pressure as a perfect storm of market volatility, artificial intelligence-driven software disruptions, and escalating Middle East tensions triggered a ...

item.title: Sheikh Gumi Says He Will Support Armed Groups Including IPOB, Boko Haram and Bandits If They Renounce Violence and Engage in Dialogue
item.description: Controversial Islamic cleric Sheikh Ahmad Abubakar Gumi don talk say him ready to support different armed groups for Nigeria like Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB), Boko Haram, ISWAP, and bandits wey...

item.title: Sharjeel Imam Granted 10-Day Interim Bail to Attend Brother’s Wedding in Delhi Riots Case
item.description: A Delhi court has granted a 10-day interim bail to activist Sharjeel Imam in connection with the 2020 Delhi riots, allowing him to attend his brother’s wedding. The Additional Sessions Judge Sameer Ba...

item.title: Nigerian Army successfully rescues two bank staff abducted in Taraba State
item.description: Nigerian Army troops under Operation Whirl Stroke don rescue two Unity Bank staff wey dem kidnap for Zaki Biam, Ukum Local Government Area of Benue State. The victims, Marwan Abubakar, 40, and Leng’en...

item.title: Operation Epic Fury: Trump Administration Argues Military Action Against Iran Protects U.S. National Security
item.description: Operation Epic Fury, led by President Donald Trump, is portrayed by supporters as a strategic effort to prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons and enhancing its missile capabilities. According to...

item.title: U.S. Submarine Sinks Iranian Warship Near Sri Lanka Amid Conflicting Claims About Armament
item.description: Last week, the Iranian warship IRIS Dena was sunk in international waters near Sri Lanka by a U.S. submarine, triggering a dispute between Washington and Tehran over whether the vessel was armed. The ...

item.title: Gulf States Face Political and Economic Uncertainty Amid US-Israel-Iran Conflict
item.description: Recent US and Israeli military actions against Iran, along with Iran’s retaliatory strikes, have exposed the fragility of Gulf states like Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and the UAE, which have long projected a...

item.title: Residents in West Pokot Voluntarily Surrender Firearms in Government Disarmament Effort
item.description: In Pokot Central Sub-County, West Pokot County, locals voluntarily surrendered twelve illegal AK-47 rifles along with twelve magazines and twenty-four rounds of ammunition at Marich Police Station. Th...

item.title: EAC Summit Advances Regional Integration with New Customs Bond and Development Strategy
item.description: The 25th Ordinary Summit of the East African Community (EAC) held in Arusha marked a major step in moving from talk to action on regional integration. Under the theme 'Deepening Integration for Improv...

item.title: Qatar detains over 300 people for circulating misleading videos during Iran attacks
item.description: Authorities in Qatar have detained more than 300 individuals for sharing videos and spreading what officials call 'misleading information' during a period of heightened attacks by Iran. The Ministry o...

item.title: California Military Families Confront Uncertainty After U.S.-Israel Attack on Iran
item.description: Military families across California are experiencing renewed anxiety following the U.S. and Israel's attack on Iran, which resulted in the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. For many fami...

item.title: Government Coordinates Socio-Economic Support for Former MILF Communities
item.description: The Office of the Special Assistant to the President (OSAP), led by Special Assistant Anton Lagdameo, is actively coordinating with key government agencies to implement socio-economic programs in the ...

item.title: US LNG Exporters Poised for Windfall Profits Amid Iran Conflict and Qatar LNG Disruptions
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran, involving US and Israeli strikes, has severely disrupted global energy markets, particularly by forcing the closure of Qatar's massive Ras Laffan LNG plant, which account...

item.title: Chinese Espionage and Its Strategic Influence on the Philippines Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East has entered its second week, with US and Israeli AI-guided airstrikes against Iran and Lebanon showing no clear end in sight. The Philippines faces indirect eco...

item.title: Carlton sidelines Sam Docherty amid voice memo controversy; Brisbane to appeal player bans
item.description: Carlton Football Club has removed former co-captain Sam Docherty from a scheduled speaking role at a corporate event following the release of a profanity-filled voice memo in which he criticised the t...

item.title: IndiGo Delhi–Manchester Flight Returns Mid-Air Due to Middle East Airspace Restrictions
item.description: An IndiGo flight 6E 033 operating from Delhi to Manchester had to return to Delhi shortly after take-off due to sudden airspace restrictions linked to the escalating tensions in the Middle East. The a...
